creator: wvengen@stack.nl
text:
The archive contains three ports which are closely related:

* sword
   The SWORD Project is an effort to create an ever expanding software
   package for research and study of God and His Word. The SWORD Bible
   Framework allows easy manipulation of Bible texts, commentaries,
   lexicons, dictionaries, etc.
   Many frontends are build using this framework. An installed module
   set may be shared between any frontend using the framework.

* sword-modules
   Bible, lexicon and commentary modules for sword.

* cheatah
   A simple gtk frontend for sword.
